description: 1. Sure. for the proactivity, it's more a question of being proactive in terms of next steps proposed, not waiting for user input if it can be done without a decision from the user. for speed, compare the speed improvement % over time to make it as fast as possible. the framework should be automated on a schedule, during the night and can be launched on demand too.
